title: Ring Jumper
shopHint: 6 space pod skins (Bubble Pod, Fire Pod, Ice Pod, Shadow Pod, Neon Pod, Crystal Pod). Earn stars flying through ring gaps.
description: Tiny pod automatically orbits a gas giant on one of four concentric rings. Tap to jump one ring outward; tap again to jump inward. Rotating debris fields appear on specific rings — jump away before impact. Stars appear on rings briefly — fly through to collect.
